channel.title: Dao on Daoyin Chuan
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

item.title: Taijiquan Broadsword (Dao)
item.description:
1. Left Ward Off
  2. Step-up to Form Seven Stars
  3. Step Back to Riding Tiger Posture
  4. Turn Body, Lift Right Leg and Cut
  5. Slash Upward to the Left
  6. Thrust the Blade
  7. Circle Blade Back, Step and Press Vertically (3 times)
  8. Draw the Bow Horizontally
  9. Push the Blade
  10. Fleeing to Pierce
  11. Corner Cut #1
  12. Corner Cut #2
  13. Corner Cut #3
  14. Corner Cut #4
  15. Lift Blade to Pierce
  16. Coil Back Stance
  17. Step Forward and Thrust the Blade
  18. Turn and Slash
  19. Recover Sword to the Left Hand and Toe Kick
  20. Left Strike the Tiger
  21. Right Strike the Tiger
  22. Heel Kick
  23. Split Down
  24. Lift Blade to Pierce
  25. Coil Back Stance
  26. Step Through and Thrust the Blade
  27. Slash Up Right
  28. Slash Up Left
  29. Slash Up Right
  30. Jump and Coil Back Stance
  31. Step Forward and Thrust the Blade
  32. Turn and Slash
  33. Return Sword to Left Hand
  34. Step Up to Form Seven Stars
  35. Conclusion
